situational_context: Early structured rebuild phase (week 4 since bootstrap). Chronic load up 25% (17.8→22.3) over 3.5 weeks, driven by regular ebike commuting (2×/week sur site, ~38 km round-trip, load ~16/day) plus first structured sessions: gravel ride (May 8, load 17) and return-to-running Run #2 (May 9, 2.01 km, load 15). Return-to-running protocol active — Run #3 green-lit for May 15. Weight trending down steadily (−2.8 kg in 3 weeks to 104.1 kg). HRV balanced with notable single-day spike to 50 (90-day max, 4.15σ) — positive parasympathetic recovery signal. RHR improved from 53→49 avg. ACWR at 0.75, below 0.8 safe zone — needs structured sessions to rebalance. Sleep fragmented last 2 nights (5.4-5.9h, baby-driven probable). Training readiness moderate today (62) but body battery highest in 7 days (61). Baby (Léonie, 16 months) continues to constrain schedule — session adherence is secondary to consistency of showing up.

recommendations.text: Execute Run #3 on Friday if no post-Run#2 pain (Achilles, patellar, tibial). 20-25 min on soft surface (Bois de Vincennes), Z1-Z2, max 2.5 km. Walk intercalée if HR >145 bpm. If any pain → walk 30 min Z1 instead and shift cycling option to Monday (congés).
recommendations.measurable: Run #3 completed at HR avg ≤145 bpm, no localized pain during or 24h after

recommendations.text: Prioritize sleep recovery — two consecutive sub-6h nights are eroding body battery and readiness. Target ≥7h tonight. If baby wakes, split sleep blocks and nap when possible.

Complete both weekend cycling sessions (Sat 60 min Z2, Sun 50 min Z1-Z2) to push ACWR toward 0.8. These are the load-builders for the week. If only one session possible, prioritize Saturday's longer ride.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Confirm today's spike (50) sustains — watch for 7d avg rising above 40
markers_to_watch.reason: Single-day HRV of 50 is 90-day max and 4.15σ above baseline. If it sustains, confirms positive adaptation to rebuild. If it drops back sharply, may be sleep-architecture artifact.
Two sub-6h nights in a row. A third would trigger the sleep deep-dive protocol and warrant deloading Friday's session.
Return-to-running protocol: tissue tolerance is the primary risk at 104 kg (+20 kg vs running era). Pain lasting >48h → skip next 2 runs.
